today_in_history_posts.title: RFC: Deterministic Entropy From BIP32 Keychains
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The proposed BIP intends to standardize seed and backup management across wallet implementations.
- It suggests deriving initial entropy from an HD keychain path to maintain BIP32's goals.
- The method uses HMAC-SHA512 on a BIP32 seed to generate various root keychains.

today_in_history_posts.title: Difference between ignoring htlc request due to wrong payment hash vs refusing to release preimage in LND
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Subhra Mazumdar experimented with LND, establishing a channel between two parties.
- An error occurred when sending a payment via HTLC due to unknown payment details.
- Subhra inquires about simulating a griefing attack where B withholds the correct preimage.

today_in_history_posts.title: Question about OP_CTV and Non-Recursive Covenants
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The OP_CTV proposal enhances Bitcoin by allowing output commitment without input commitment.
- It discusses technical challenges and possible solutions for executing complex transactions on the Bitcoin network.
- Broader implications include potentially expanding Bitcoin's functionality to issuing securities and enhancing its utility.
